data_quality_notes: Proxy used: Energy use per capita kg oil equivalent (WB EG.USE.PCAP.KG.OE). Attempted OICA vehicle fleet data (no URL, restricted). World Bank IS.VEH.NVEH.P3 returned 0 records; IS.VEH.MOTO.Q4, EN.CO2.TRAN.ZS, EN.CO2.TRAN.MT all returned invalid/empty payloads. Tried EN.ATM.NOXE.KT.CE (NOx emissions), EG.USE.TRAN.ZS (transport energy %), IS.ROD.GOOD.MT.K6 (road goods), IS.VEH.ROAD.K1, EN.CO2.ETOT.ZS. Settled on 'Energy use per capita kg oil equivalent (WB EG.USE.PCAP.KG.OE)' as best available approximate proxy. Note: OEB measures ozone exposure in Key Biodiversity Areas (not urban areas), which may weaken the expected vehicle emission → NOx → ozone link.
summary: Used 'Energy use per capita kg oil equivalent (WB EG.USE.PCAP.KG.OE)' as approximate proxy for vehicle fleet size/fuel consumption. Bivariate Pearson r=0.350 (p=0.000), Spearman rho=0.256 (p=0.000), n=3069 observations across 176 countries. Partial r=0.234 (p=0.000) controlling for log(GDP/capita). Best functional form: linear. Verdict: confirmed.
